<!-- Thanks for the contribution! A few quick checks make this easier to merge. -->

## What does this change?

<!-- One or two sentences. -->

## How did you test it?

- [ ] `pytest` passes locally
- [ ] Ran `javalamp <my-scene>` and watched it for a bit
- [ ] (If new scene) added to `scenes/__init__.py` import block
- [ ] (If new scene) added scene name to the `expected` set in `tests/test_canvas.py::test_scene_registry_populated`
- [ ] (If touching the framework) ran `javalamp` for ~30s in the cycle to make sure no scene blew up

## Screenshots / recordings

<!-- Especially helpful for new scenes. asciinema or a static screenshot is great. -->
